sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49856" key="i)dioceni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰδῐο-ξενία</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐδ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n49856.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">private friendship</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
